content.en:
"There are too many powerful Triple Ancestors!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Along the way, he sensed a lot of top-level Triple Ancestors who were even more terrifying than him, and one by one they had mastered dozens of extreme extreme paths, and they should all be genius Ancestors of the Fivefold Holy Gate.

These Triple Primordial Ancestors could have achieved the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor a long time ago, so they deliberately dragged it out and did not want to impact, but wanted to break through to the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor with a more perfect foundation potential.

But in fact, in terms of status, they were higher than many of the Quadruple Origin Ancestors of the Quadruple Heavenly Gate, and once they broke through to the Quadruple Ancestor, their strength would instantly crush many Quadruple Primordial Ancestors.

It hadn't been long since Ye Tiancai had broken through to the Triple Ancestor, and he couldn't even compare to a fraction of their cultivation years.

Therefore, Ye Tian was not hit.

Just give them time, it's easy to get ahead of them.

Time passed slowly, and one day after another passed in the original realm.

"Eighteen Primordial Spirit Holy Fruits, plus other treasures that help to enhance the will of the Extreme Dao, can definitely make my Extreme Will skyrocket a lot!" Ye Tian muttered.

However, it was absolutely impossible to rely on these Primordial Spirit Sacred Fruits to condense the Will Pagoda to the three hundred and sixty-fifth layers.

However, this harvest can condense some more layers of the Pagoda of Will, which is also satisfying!

Soon, there was only one tenth of the original field days left.

At this time, almost all the resources of the Void God Domain were scraped.

Nowadays, the entire Void God Domain is full of fighting, after all, at this time, killing a Triple Ancestor can obtain the resources of the opponent's body, so killing people and grabbing treasures is the fastest way to accumulate resources.

And Ye Tian's cultivation is very low, and he is only in the early stage of the Triple Ancestor, so he was quickly targeted.

No, a powerhouse at the peak of the Triple Origin Ancestor was eyeing Ye Tian, but Ye Tian was also eyeing the other party.

Rumble!!

The two shot at the same time, Ye Tian instantly killed the other party, seized the treasure on the other party's body, and fled directly.

"This guy is unlucky, he has a lot more resources than me, it seems that he has killed a lot of Triple Ancestors, but now he is cheaper than me!"

Ye Tian didn't have time to slowly sort out the other party's harvest, so let's sort it out slowly after going out.

Soon, Ye Tian killed several more Triple Ancestors, and he gained more and more.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian found himself locked on, and a Triple Ancestor shot an arrow from a great distance.

This arrow contains a powerful primordial mastery technique, and an arrow comes through endless time and space.

"Nine Extremes Black Armor!"

Ye Tian urged this primordial control technique with all his might, and many life-saving Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments and countless Perfect-level Ancestral Endowments on his body were all urged.

Burst!

The arrow pierced through Ye Tian's body, but Ye Tian escaped in time, and then used the Extreme Cause and Effect Extreme Dao to instantly cut off many causes and effects, so that the enemy could not track him.

Distance.

A blood-red young man put away the bow and arrow of the Extreme Dao Divine Weapon and frowned: "How is it possible that a guy in the early stage of the Triple Origin Ancestor actually blocked me with an arrow without dying?"

However, at this time, it was already a step too late for him to chase and kill Ye Tian.

"Forget it, let's go kill the other Triple Ancestors!"

The young man fled.

......

"That guy is really powerful, the power of this arrow is more than a thousand times more than mine, fortunately I have many life-saving means, otherwise I will really be killed by the other party's arrow!" Ye Tian muttered.

He remembered the other party, and he definitely had to get back on the field in the future.

"Blood Shadow Ancestor, the next time we meet, I'll kill you!"

Ye Tian's injuries recovered at a speed that was visible to the naked eye, and after a while, the injuries were completely recovered.

Next, Ye Tian was cautious and killed some more Triple Ancestors, and finally waited for the Void God Domain to close.

Airplanes!!!

A large number of Triple Ancestors were ostracized from the Void God Domain.

Many Quadruple Primordial Ancestors saw that nearly eighty percent of the Triple Primordial Ancestors had fallen in the Void God Domain, and fortunately it was a will clone, otherwise the major forces would be distressed.

"The Endless Ancestor actually came out alive!"

The Fourfold Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate were a little surprised.

After all, in their opinion, although Ye Tian has a high potential, his potential has not yet been transformed into strength, and he actually came out alive in the Void God Domain.

"Good luck!"

These fourfold ancestors secretly said.

Except for good luck, they couldn't think of a reason why Ye Tian could survive.

Soon, many of the Triple Ancestors returned to their forces one by one.

After Ye Tian returned to the Voidless Heavenly Gate, he immediately announced a retreat.

......

"Let's sort out the resources first!"

Ye Tian took out a large number of resource treasures and sorted them out, among which there were many Extreme Dao Monuments, and I didn't know how many treasures containing the Extreme Dao.

It can be said that there will be no shortage of treasures for Ye Tian's comprehension of other extreme extreme paths in the future.

And Ye Tian's most desired Primordial Spirit Sacred Fruit was more than a thousand, because one of the Triple Primordial Ancestors had actually collected hundreds, which made him extremely surprised.

"Hahaha, I'm afraid that the Triple Ancestor is angry now!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

It took a while for Ye Tian to sort out all the resources.

It can be said that the value of these resources is something he didn't dare to imagine in the past!

"Let's improve the will of the Extreme Dao first, the will of the Extreme Dao is raised, and only then can we condense more layers of the Will Pagoda!"

Immediately, Ye Tian began to continuously devour some treasures that could enhance the will of the Extreme Dao, and as for the Origin Spirit Holy Fruit, he kept it for the future and slowly refined it.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao will continued to improve, and the layers of the Will Pagoda were also constantly condensed.

Thirty-four tiers of Pagoda of Will!

Thirty-five tiers of Pagoda of Will!

Thirty-six tiers of Pagoda of Will!

When Ye Tian raised the Will Pagoda to the thirty-sixth floor, he found that he could no longer condense the Will Pagoda, and no matter how many resources he had, it was useless.

"Strange, what's going on?"

Ye Tian was curious.

So, he went to check the information, and then he found out why.

It turns out that the limit of the number of layers of the Willing Pagoda of the normal Triple Ancestor is thirty-six layers, and only by inscribed the thirty-six layers of the Willpower Pagoda on the Extreme Path and gathering the thirty-six Extreme Extremes can the Extreme Pagoda be broken, otherwise no matter how strong the will of the Extreme Dao is, it will not be able to condense the thirty-seventh layer of the Will.

"Although the Pagoda of Will cannot continue to condense the layers, the Extreme Dao Will can continue to improve, and it does not prevent me from refining these resources, and my cultivation can also be improved. "

Ye Tian's copy body in the Voidless Heaven Gate worked hard to improve his cultivation and Extreme Dao Will in the following years, while the other copy bodies went all out to comprehend the Extreme Extreme Dao and the black characters.

In this way, the years passed, and in the blink of an eye, it was a hundred years of the Origin Domain.
